title: Derive multiple related storage slots from a single master seed constant
description: A single master slot seed constant is used to derive ownership slots, balance slots, approval slots, and operator slots. The seed is combined with addresses using or() at specific memory offsets, and different hash lengths (0x1c, 0x20, 0x30, 0x34) select different slot families. This eliminates the need for multiple separate mapping slot constants and ensures all slots are derived from one auditable constant.
when_to_apply: Token contracts with multiple related mappings (owner, balance, approval, operator) that should share a unified storage namespace
when_not_to_apply: Simple contracts with a single mapping, or contracts where independent slot constants improve auditability
